description: Modal over roster: Mark Attendance title, confirmation copy for class and date, Summary card (Total, On Leave, Present, Absent), Notify parents of absentees with channel toggles (Whatsapp, SMS), disclaimer text, Submit and Cancel.

example_response.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to mark today's attendance for class XII - C ?
example_response.notificationDisclaimer: Notification will be triggered to the parents of the students who are marked absent.

notes: confirmMessage uses curly apostrophe in Figma (today's); example uses ASCII apostrophe. draftAttendance in request is optional linkage if submit API validates client-side roster; omit if server recomputes from session id only. Modal stacks visually above same roster as student-attendance-roster-* screens.
